scope: Seeded-defect corpus for the internal detector-regression gate. Each case pairs a recorded AUDIT.json with the defects deliberately seeded in the audited source, mapped to the A-check that owns each one. The gate asks one question: after a catalog change, do the seeded defects still get detected? These cases are not a sample of real-world repositories, so nothing here estimates reliability on unseen code and no number derived from them feeds a per-repo score.

cases.name: tenant-predicate-omitted
cases.seeded: A board lookup queries by id with no tenant predicate, so an authenticated user can read another tenant's board.
